title: Badge Component
content:
The `Badge` component is a UI element used to display status, categories, or tags. It's built using `class-variance-authority` for flexible styling and `cn` for class name merging. ## Key Exports * **`Badge`**: The main React component for rendering a badge. * **`badgeVariants`**: A `cva` function that generates CSS class names based on variants. ## Props * **`variant`**: Controls the appearance of the badge. Accepts: * `default`: Primary color scheme. * `secondary`: Secondary color scheme. * `destructive`: Destructive color scheme (e.g., for errors). * `outline`: An outlined style. * **`className`**: Allows for additional custom CSS classes to be applied. * **`...props`**: Standard HTML attributes for a `div` element. ## Usage Example ```tsx import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; function MyComponent() { return (
Default Secondary Destructive Outline
); } ```
